Name: Critical
Definition: Material that is critical for proper functionality. Without this asset, the IP would not be able to function.

Name: Secret
Definition: Material that requires confidentiality and should not be accessible outside the IP

Name: Sensitive
Definition: Material that requires integrity but not necessarily confidentiality.
Examples: Root of Trust (e.g. Asymmetric public key), fuse/OTP

Name: Control
Definition: Material used to alter and/or control the state of the IP. This material can also setup or configure the IP.

Name: Cryptographic
Definition: Material that is part of a cryptographic operation

Name: Code/Data
Definition: Material that contains information which can alter the behavior of the IP

Name: Compute
Definition: Material that is part of an execution engine that operates on opcodes or instructions
